# PHLivePhotoEditingErrorCode.unknown

**Case**

No further information is available about the cause of the error.

## Declaration

```swift
case unknown
```

## Constants

- **PHLivePhotoEditingErrorCode.aborted**: Live Photo processing was canceled by the Processing an Editing Context’s Live Photo method.
